# GitHub Copilot Instructions — PAX Festival 2026

This file bridges AAMS workspace conventions to GitHub Copilot.  
See [../../AGENTS.md](../../AGENTS.md) for the full agent contract.

## Quick Reference

- Always read `READ-AGENT.md` and `WORKING/MEMORY/ltm-index.md` before starting work
- Open or create a workpaper in `WORKING/WORKPAPER/` for every session
- Never write secrets into any file — use `.env` only
- Tech stack: Vue.js 3 (CDN), no bundler, Python dev server port 8080
